title: secretx-aws-ssm: implement AWS SSM Parameter Store backend
description: Implement SecretStore for AWS SSM Parameter Store. URI: secretx://aws-ssm/<parameter-name>[?version=<n>][?label=<name>]. get() calls GetParameter with WithDecryption:true; SecureString parameters are decrypted automatically using the parameter KMS key. String and StringList also supported; StringList returned as raw comma-separated bytes. put() calls PutParameter with Overwrite:true. refresh() bypasses cache. Optional ?version=<n> for specific version; ?label=<name> for parameter label. Credential chain via aws-config. Dep: secretx-core, aws-sdk-ssm, aws-config. Integration tests via LocalStack.
